originalTitle: Want to live longer in retirement? This one money move could add years to your life.
summary: A secure retirement portfolio acts like a health shield, calming market anxiety that can actually shorten life expectancy.
content: A secure retirement portfolio acts like a health shield, calming market anxiety that can actually shorten life expectancy.
chineseTitle: 想在退休后活得更久吗？这一笔钱的举动可能会延长你的寿命。
chineseSummary: 安全的退休投资组合就像健康盾牌，可以平息市场焦虑，而这种焦虑实际上会缩短预期寿命。
chineseContent: 安全的退休投资组合就像健康盾牌，可以平息市场焦虑，而这种焦虑实际上会缩短预期寿命。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
